extension.description: Extract, resurrect, and manage AI session histories locally across IDEs.
config.title: Edo Tensei
config.promptLanguage.description: The language used for generating the handoff prompt template.
config.handoffMode.description: How to package the handoff prompt. 'path' is recommended for token efficiency; 'fullText' is the original behaviour.
config.handoffMode.pathDescription: Output the session file path + per-IDE reading guide. Token-efficient; requires the receiving agent to have file-read capability.
config.handoffMode.fullTextDescription: Embed the full conversation in the prompt. Works everywhere but uses more tokens.
config.customScanPaths.description: Custom absolute paths to scan for each IDE's session histories. (e.g. { "claude": ["D:/custom/.claude"] })
viewContainer.title: Edo Tensei
view.sessions.name: Edo Tensei
view.welcome:
Edo Tensei — Cross-IDE AI session handoff, without starting over.

[Scan All IDEs](command:edoTensei.scanAllIdes)

[Generate Skill](command:edoTensei.generateAgentSkill)
command.resurrectSession.title: Edo Tensei: Resurrect Session
command.copyHandoffPrompt.title: Edo Tensei: Copy Handoff Prompt
command.openSessionFile.title: Edo Tensei: Open Session File
command.scanAllIdes.title: Scan All IDEs
command.exportAllSessions.title: Export All Parsed Sessions to .edo_tensei
command.exportSession.title: Export Parsed Session to .edo_tensei
command.previewRawSession.title: Preview Raw Session File
command.viewParsedSession.title: View Parsed Session
command.copyRawPath.title: Copy Raw File Path
command.copyReferencePrompt.title: Copy Reference Prompt
command.copyContextPrompt.title: Copy Context Prompt
command.openSettings.title: Edo Tensei: Settings
command.generateAgentSkill.title: Generate Agent Skill
command.showMcpConfig.title: Show MCP Config
config.lazyLoadMessages.description: Enable lazy loading: only scan the first message during Scan; full content loads on hover/preview. Disable to restore eager loading for debugging comparison.
config.backgroundMessageLoading.descript: After scanning, silently load full message content in the background (concurrency: 1, 50 ms pause between sessions). Improves full-text search coverage at the cost of extra disk I/O. Disable on slow disks or low-end machines.
config.mcpConfig.enabled.description: Enable MCP Config UI (beta). When disabled, the MCP button is hidden and the command is disabled.
command.refreshIde.title: Refresh This IDE
command.searchSessions.title: Search Sessions
command.searchIde.title: Search Sessions in This IDE
command.loadMoreSessions.title: Load More Sessions
config.maxSessionsPerIde.description: Maximum number of sessions to show per IDE. When exceeded, a 'Load more…' button appears. Increase this if you want to see more sessions at once (may slow down scanning).
